question: Show all transactions above 10 lakh INR from the last 30 days Which sender banks sent the most wires to high-risk countries? top 10 beneficiaries by total amount received
sql:
WITH recent_transactions AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM fingate_AccountDetail
    WHERE amount > 1000000 -- 10 lakh INR
      AND transaction_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
),
high_risk_countries AS (
    SELECT country_code
    FROM finnet_Country
    WHERE is_high_risk = TRUE
),
filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM recent_transactions rt
    JOIN high_risk_countries hrc ON rt.beneficiary_country = hrc.country_code
),
grouped_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        sender_bank,
        beneficiary,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount_received
    FROM filtered_transactions
    GROUP BY sender_bank, beneficiary
)
SELECT *
FROM grouped_transactions
ORDER BY total_amount_received DESC
LIMIT 10

question: Show all transactions above 10 lakh INR from the last 30 days Which sender banks sent the most wires to high-risk countries? top 10 beneficiaries by total amount received
sql:
WITH high_risk_countries AS (
    SELECT country_code
    FROM fincore_bridge.fingate_EntityDetail
    WHERE country IN ('Country1', 'Country2', 'Country3') -- Replace with actual high-risk countries
),
filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        sender_bank,
        beneficiary,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM 
        fingate_AccountDetail
    WHERE 
        amount > 1000000 -- 10 lakh INR
        AND transaction_date >= DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE())
        AND beneficiary IN (SELECT country_code FROM high_risk_countries)
    GROUP BY 
        sender_bank, beneficiary
),
top_10_beneficiaries AS (
    SELECT 
        sender_bank,
        beneficiary,
        total_amount
    FROM 
        filtered_transactions
    ORDER BY 
        total_amount DESC
    OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
)

SELECT * FROM top_10_beneficiaries

question: find the all transaction from china to india with sender id,sender name, benificiary name, and the amout ,date and time
sql:
SELECT 
    t.transactionId,
    t.trasactionTime,
    t.senderIdentifierAcNo AS senderID,
    t.senderName,
    t.benificiaryName,
    t.amountInTxCurrency AS amount,
    t.transactionDate
FROM 
    [FINCORE_BRIDGE].[fingate_CbwtrBank] t
JOIN 
    [FIUMetaHub].[finnet_Country] c ON t.originCountry = c.id_
WHERE 
    t.originCountry = 40 -- China
    AND t.destinationCountry = 100 -- India

question: Show all transactions above 10 lakh INR from the last 30 days Which sender banks sent the most wires to high-risk countries? top 10 beneficiaries by total amount received
sql:
SELECT 
    t.senderBankOrBic AS SenderBank,
    SUM(t.amountInInr) / 100000.0 AS TotalAmountInLakh,
    COUNT(t.transactionId) AS TransactionCount
FROM 
    [FINCORE_BRIDGE].[fingate_CbwtrBank] t
WHERE 
    t.transactionDate >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, GETDATE())
    AND t.amountInInr > 10000000
    AND (t.destinationCountry = 40 OR t.destinationCountry = 50)
GROUP BY 
    t.senderBankOrBic
ORDER BY 
    TotalAmountInLakh DESC,
    TransactionCount DESC
LIMIT 10
